AppLockerRules: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><AppLockerPolicy Version="1"><RuleCollection Type="Exe" EnforcementMode="Enforce"><Description>AppLocker rules for executables</Description><FilePublisherRule Id="921cc481-6e17-4653-8f75-050b76c3467b" Name="Allow Microsoft executables" Description="This rule permits the running of any application published by Microsoft." UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="O=MICROSOFT CORPORATION, L=REDMOND, S=WASHINGTON, C=US" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule><FilePathRule Id="3d57af4d-c30b-4618-bccb-76e7f664cb91" Name="Allow Program Files executables" Description="Allows execution of applications in Program Files directory" UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePathCondition Path="C:\Program Files\*" /></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePathRule><FilePathRule Id="3d57af4d-c30b-4618-bccb-76e7f664cb92" Name="Allow Program Files (x86) executables" Description="Allows execution of applications in Program Files (x86) directory" UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePathCondition Path="C:\Program Files (x86)\*" /></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePathRule><FilePathRule Id="3d57af4d-c30b-4618-bccb-76e7f664cb93" Name="Allow Windows System executables" Description="Allows execution of applications in Windows System directories" UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePathCondition Path="C:\Windows\*" /></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePathRule></RuleCollection><RuleCollection Type="Dll" EnforcementMode="Enforce"><Description>AppLocker rules for DLLs</Description><FilePublisherRule Id="921cc481-6e17-4653-8f75-050b76c3467c" Name="Allow signed DLLs" Description="Allows loading of digitally signed DLLs" UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="*" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule></RuleCollection><RuleCollection Type="Script" EnforcementMode="Enforce"><Description>AppLocker rules for scripts</Description><FilePublisherRule Id="921cc481-6e17-4653-8f75-050b76c3467d" Name="Allow signed scripts" Description="Allows execution of digitally signed scripts" UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePublisherCondition PublisherName="*" ProductName="*" BinaryName="*"><BinaryVersionRange LowSection="*" HighSection="*" /></FilePublisherCondition></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePublisherRule><FilePathRule Id="3d57af4d-c30b-4618-bccb-76e7f664cb94" Name="Allow Windows scripts" Description="Allows scripts in Windows directory" UserOrGroupSid="S-1-1-0" Action="Allow"><Conditions><FilePathCondition Path="C:\Windows\*" /></Conditions><Exceptions></Exceptions></FilePathRule></RuleCollection></AppLockerPolicy>
